rationale: Keep: the cited paper is not just generic background but a close conceptual match—its core question is whether consumers react to what others receive (“betrayal/jealousy” in targeted promotions), while the citing paper’s mechanism is also relative-to-others evaluation (“idiosyncratic fit” and perceived effort advantage vs typical others). Given this direct overlap in social-comparison/fairness logic and both being in promotion/CRM contexts, it is plausibly a theory/mechanism source worth full relation judgment.
